# Reda Herradi

> Senior software engineer at Oracle, based in Morocco. Currently working on the Oracle Payment System.

I'm a senior software engineer at Oracle, based in Morocco. These days I work on the Oracle Payment System — used by multi-billion-dollar companies to manage payments with their customers. Before that I spent a chapter on Datastudio, a data visualization and graph exploration tool, from active development through to its handover.

The work I care most about is leading products that have a real impact — spotting the gaps where a team could be more efficient, and experimenting enough in the field to find the small things that quietly make everyone's life better. As part of the IAAP I sit alongside C-suite and directors on the new projects coming into Oracle, and was recently placed on a leadership track aimed at engineers being grown into bigger roles.

## Pages

- [About](https://herradi.com/): Who I am and what I work on.
- [Experience](https://herradi.com/experience): Roles at Oracle, Nuitee, Bell, and SQLi, plus education.
- [Contact](https://herradi.com/contact): Email, phone, GitHub, LinkedIn.

## Experience

- **Oracle** (Feb 2025 – present): Senior software engineer. Joined to work on Datastudio (data visualization and graph exploration) through to handover, then moved onto the Oracle Payment System — leading a team, contributing to product design, writing and shipping code. Member of the IAAP, working alongside C-suite and directors on incoming projects. Recently placed on a leadership track.
- **Nuitee** (Feb 2024 – Dec 2024): Led a team of three frontend developers on WhiteLabel, a heavily customizable travel-site generator. Drove a complete redesign of the admin dashboard and a top-to-bottom overhaul of the B2C interface. Pushed standards across the codebase and added the SEO layer. Stack: Vue, Node, SQL.
- **Bell** (Dec 2022 – Jan 2024): Software engineer across web projects for Bell and Bell Media. Built the reusable UI layer (cards, sliders, banners) plus user tracking, third-party integrations, and data aggregation. Stack: Vue.js, Adobe Experience Manager, Java.
- **SQLi** (Jul 2021 – Nov 2022): Frontend engineer on projects for Tesco and Nespresso. Built and shipped components, implemented user-tracking, and worked directly with Nestlé's design team. Stack: NuxtJS, Vue, TypeScript.

## Education

- Bachelor of Computer Science, Al Akhawayn University in Ifrane.

## Skills

Frontend engineering, Vue.js, React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, web performance, accessibility, team leadership.
